creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Taavi,

I'm trying to find out what the state of this PR [1] is. Are you still
seeing the problem you described with an up-to-date ports tree, or can the
PR be closed?

As Mark already mentioned, there is no devel/python port, but there are
several versions of Python in lang/. Can you tell us which one you're
seeing the described problem with?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/122596
